detectors.description:
WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.setEmergencySecrets(uint256,uint256) (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#103-109) should emit an event for: 
	- emergencyCode = code (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#105) 
	- emergencyAmount = amount (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#107)

Reentrancy in WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.call(address,bytes,uint256) (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#87-99):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(addr.call.value(amount)(data)) (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#95)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Call(msg.sender,addr,amount) (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#97)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.call(address,bytes,uint256)](WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#L87-L99):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(addr.call.value(amount)(data))](WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#L95)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Call(msg.sender,addr,amount)](WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#L97)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.18 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.18 (WalletWithEmergencyTransfer.sol#1)

detectors.description:

	Event emitted after the call(s):
